caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and a tall, grey, textured wig is seated in a studio. He wears glasses and large over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a professional microphone, speaking and shifting his gaze slightly while gesturing. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and a black leather chair. To the right, a clothing rack displays garments, including a yellow shirt with the word "LEE" visible. Two identical logos appear on the screen, one on the left and one on the right, featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, with minor changes in his facial expression and head tilt as he continues to speak into the microphone.
